text.tspan: Total time = 1 RTT for the burst + serial server work
u2192 N requests cost 1 RTT, not N RTTs
Total: 1 RTT + server processing time for ALL 3,000 ops.
Used by: Kafka producer (with acks=all + in-flight batches),
HTTP/2 multiplexing, Redis pipelining, gRPC bidi streaming,

g.text: WITHOUT PIPELINING u2014 strictly sequential request/response
WITH PIPELINING u2014 send all requests, then receive all responses
